title: Algorithm Testing Component Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the systematic process for testing a software component as part of algorithm analysis and design.
relationships: Sequential flow from Test Case Generation to Component Execution, then to Result Observation, which is compared against the Expected Outcome. Based on the Result Comparison, a Pass/Fail Determination is made. If failed, the process leads to Bug Reporting before concluding with Test Documentation. If passed, the process proceeds directly to Test Documentation.
